title: orbeopsis knobelii
intro: Orbeopsis knobelii, also known as the African starfish succulent, is a type of succulent plant native to South Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Orbeopsis knobelii include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting immune function. It can be prepared for herbal use through infusion, decoction, or tincture, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and optimal preparation methods.
